mapper.sql: question_id AS "questionId", CASE WHEN bank_type = 'leetcode' THEN 'leetcode' ELSE 'qa' END AS "bankType", title, category, difficulty, question_type AS "questionType", content, answer, tags_json AS "tagsJson", coding_meta_json AS "codingMetaJson", enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"

sql.if: AND CASE WHEN bank_type = 'leetcode' THEN 'leetcode' ELSE 'qa' END = #{bankType}

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_question WHERE enabled = TRUE
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN bank_type = 'leetcode' THEN 'leetcode' ELSE 'qa' END FROM interview_question WHERE enabled = TRUE ORDER BY 1 ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_question( title, bank_type, category, difficulty, question_type, content, answer, tags_json, coding_meta_json, enabled, updated_at, question_id ) VALUES ( #{question.title}, #{question.bankType}, #{question.category}, #{question.difficulty}, #{question.questionType}, #{question.content}, #{question.answer}, #{question.tagsJson}, #{question.codingMetaJson}, #{question.enabled}, #{question.updatedAt}, #{question.questionId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_question SET title = #{question.title}, bank_type = #{question.bankType}, category = #{question.category}, difficulty = #{question.difficulty}, question_type = #{question.questionType}, content = #{question.content}, answer = #{question.answer}, tags_json = #{question.tagsJson}, coding_meta_json = #{question.codingMetaJson}, enabled = #{question.enabled}, updated_at = #{question.updatedAt} WHERE question_id = #{question.questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_exam( tenant_id, user_id, exam_id, title, status, total_count, answered_count, score, duration_minutes, strategy_json, started_at, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{examId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{answeredCount}, #{score}, #{durationMinutes}, #{strategyJson}, #{startedAt}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT exam_id AS "examId", exam_id AS "practiceId", title, status, total_count AS "totalCount", answered_count AS "answeredCount", score, duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", strategy_json AS "strategyJson", started_at AS "startedAt", expires_at AS "expiresAt", submitted_at AS "submittedAt" FROM interview_exam WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT exam_id AS "examId", exam_id AS "practiceId", title, status, total_count AS "totalCount", answered_count AS "answeredCount", score, duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", strategy_json AS "strategyJson", started_at AS "startedAt", expires_at AS "expiresAt", submitted_at AS "submittedAt" FROM interview_exam WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT exam_id AS "examId", exam_id AS "practiceId", title, status, total_count AS "totalCount", answered_count AS "answeredCount", score, duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", strategy_json AS "strategyJson", started_at AS "startedAt", expires_at AS "expiresAt", submitted_at AS "submittedAt" FROM interview_exam WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT eq.user_answer AS "userAnswer", eq.correct, eq.score, eq.display_order AS "displayOrder", q.question_id AS "questionId", CASE WHEN q.bank_type = 'leetcode' THEN 'leetcode' ELSE 'qa' END AS "bankType", q.title, q.category, q.difficulty, q.question_type AS "questionType", q.content, q.answer, q.tags_json AS "tagsJson", q.coding_meta_json AS "codingMetaJson", q.enabled, q.created_at AS "createdAt", q.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM interview_exam_question eq JOIN interview_question q ON q.question_id = eq.question_id WHERE eq.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY eq.display_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_exam SET status = 'submitted', answered_count = #{answeredCount}, score = #{score}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt} WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
